elin-contracts/contracts/utils/Context.sol":{"keccak256":"0x493033a8d1b176a037b2cc6a04dad01a5c157722049bbecf632ca876224dd4b2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6a708e8a5bdb1011c2c381c9a5cfd8a9a956d7d0a9dc1bd8bcdaf52f76ef2f12","dweb:/ipfs/Qmax9WHBnVsZP46ZxEMNRQpLQnrdE4dK8LehML1Py8FowF"]},"src/PriceFeedL1.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9ba6d1c8cde0c957051f1ddd826f7a2db19b5f1c7a1fd250481c3beea784ee28","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6a7ce74a023bcbdce44a015d2ee005a5eddf6f02340b6e2a9fc6983b92c2fc0b","dweb:/ipfs/QmTna1LBBamdErHo6DnzqCyP5ntSJFQsZLmK7Qigrfz49X"]},"src/interfaces/IUniswapV3.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcd135c54c9e8b2d1574182e7cd509887f8b97d38171bc569080f654e13f7d85b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a0a28889a3bfd4b9ebd055d2af0a34d8066da3df9c0fdc10d7d94e1e70da54ae","dweb:/ipfs/QmemY737xWiSL1QP9MvrcHuPFYSG3yYWX56AFrKu5MSfmH"]},"src/libraries/TwapLibrary.sol":{"keccak256":"0xee3f93789c853aa91cbc2d3e5d1a791913f5e78ad0f93df76544ecde5936d6df","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8862db4dd2194003ea1f6ae342935c389eebde1cdf547b474f4a3d56b2e3ddf8","dweb:/ipfs/QmWVLCMHmLCUohE4FQeP1nCzQ2VCQy8eMv9Aza7GSBMiS2"]}},"version":1}

returns._0: uint256 The price in USD with 18 decimals.

returns.twapPrice18: The TWAP price in USD with 18 decimals, or 0 if no config is set.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._bps: New threshold. Use 0 to disable all TWAP checks (not recommended).

setSequencerFeed(address).details: Set to address(0) to disable the check (default, for L1 deployments).

params._intermediateIsUsd: True when the pool's quote token is a USD stablecoin.
params._intermediateToken: If the pool quotes in WETH, provide the WETH address so we                            can convert WETH -> USD via its Chainlink feed.                            If the pool quotes directly in a USD stablecoin, set this                            to address(0) and set _intermediateIsUsd = true.
params._pool: Address of the Uniswap V3 pool to observe.
params._token: Token whose price we want to validate (e.g. WBTC).

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

DEFAULT_TWAP_WINDOW().notice: Default TWAP window used when registering a new config without specifying one.

addPriceFeed(address,address).notice: Add a Chainlink price feed for a token.

getAmountInUsd(address,uint256).notice: Returns the USD value of a given token amount, normalized to 18 decimals.

getPairLatestPrice(address,address).notice: Returns the latest price of a token pair.

getTokenLatestPriceInUsd(address).notice: Returns the latest price of a token in USD, normalized to 18 decimals.         Performs:           1. L2 sequencer uptime check           2. Chainlink staleness / validity checks           3. Chainlink min/max circuit breaker           4. Uniswap V3 TWAP deviation check (if config registered for token)

getTwapPrice(address).notice: Read the TWAP price for a token without the deviation check.         Useful for off-chain monitoring and dashboards.

isPairSupported(address,address).notice: Returns true if both tokens have Chainlink USD feeds registered.

maxDeviationBps().notice: Maximum allowed deviation between Chainlink and TWAP (in basis points, 1% = 100 bps).         If the prices differ by more than this, the transaction reverts.         Set to 0 to disable TWAP check for all tokens (not recommended).

removeTwapConfig(address).notice: Remove the TWAP config for a token (disables TWAP check for that token).

setMaxDeviationBps(uint256).notice: Set the maximum allowed Chainlink-vs-TWAP deviation in basis points.

setSequencerFeed(address).notice: Set the Chainlink L2 Sequencer Uptime feed address.

setStalenessThreshold(uint256).notice: Set the staleness threshold for price feeds (owner only).

setTwapConfig(address,address,address,bo.notice: Register or update a Uniswap V3 TWAP source for a token.
